Start with the question you need answered.

Whether you need a focused analysis, a longer engagement, or presentation support, the fastest way to begin is with a short conversation about your decision, your data, and your timeline.

Before we talk

A short list helps make the first conversation more productive.

You do not need every answer in place. Even a rough outline of the challenge is enough to start.

  • ●The decision or challenge you are trying to support
  • ●What data sources are already available
  • ●Who needs the final analysis or presentation
  • ●Any timelines, milestones, or public-facing deadlines

Dunsworth, Mann, & Associates, LLC

A focused consulting practice for 9-1-1 organizations that need dependable analytics, data science support, and presentation-ready insights.
